persona: P7 — Taiwanese developer, all-Traditional + Taiwan regional vocab (影片/檔案/錨點/伺服器/網頁)
backend_state: F1-F6 + Meta v1 (sha 8e2f3a59) + Triage v2 (sha 1078d6ba) — layer-split A/B (Meta stays v1, only Triage swapped to v2)

v1_baseline_W2.3.result: FAIL@T2 — D16 script-norm + D17 triage Trad vocab; 1/7 slots (job only); confidence 0.0

M2_meta_v2_only.result: PARTIAL — D16 script-norm FIXED (side-effect), D17 triage still FAIL@T2; 1/7 slots; confidence 0.0

M5_triage_v2_only_THIS_RUN.result: TRIAGE-V2-FIX-CONFIRMED — D17 triage Trad vocab FIXED; 7/8 slots (mirror unreachable due to predicate auto-termination); confidence 0.95

outcome_summary: Triage-v2 (sha 1078d6ba) decisively unblocks the Traditional-Chinese anchor-vocab extraction defect (D17). T2 (錨點/檔案/轉檔), T3 (記憶/Redis/GCS), T4 (拖檔/網頁), T5 (穩健性/重試/FFmpeg), T6 (範圍/QPS/單檔), T7 (驗收/YouTuber) all classified `relevant` and extracted into covered_slots in a single pass each. 7 of 8 slots covered; the 8th (mirror) was unreachable because the predicate auto-terminated the session after acceptance with `predicate_done_no_spec_pending_synthesis`. Confidence trajectory 0.0 → 0.15 → 0.3 → 0.4 → 0.7 → 0.75 → 0.85 → 0.95 is monotone and well-calibrated. Compared to M2 (Meta-v2 only, 1/7 slots, FAIL@T2), this is a +6 slots improvement attributable entirely to the triage-layer swap.
termination_reason: predicate_done_no_spec_pending_synthesis (auto-terminated after acceptance — done=true, playback generated)
transient_5xx_note: T4 needed 2 retries, T5 needed 1, T7 needed 3 (the 4th with mild rephrasing succeeded). All 5xx were `llm complete returned ok=false; content=<empty>` — backend-side LLM transient, NOT a triage-v2 defect. Backend retry policy could be tightened.

triage_class_per_turn.T2_anchor: relevant (extracted → anchor slot — KEY WIN vs v1/M2 where this was IRRELEVANT/UNPARSEABLE)

traditional_vocab_extracted.definition: Traditional-Chinese-specific tokens that (a) appeared in user input, (b) were NOT rejected by triage as irrelevant/unparseable, and (c) made it through into a covered_slot.

script_in_q_echos.T1_response_Q2: Traditional (影片轉檔工具/網站/電腦/軟體 — Meta v1 echoed Trad on its own)
script_in_q_echos.T2_response_Q3: Traditional (檔案/原檔名/轉檔/工具/檔案列表/上傳介面)
script_in_q_echos.T3_response_Q4: Traditional (聽起來/轉檔任務狀態/原始檔案/第一眼/點擊)
script_in_q_echos.T4_response_Q5: Traditional (網頁/拖放檔案/使用者/壞掉)
script_in_q_echos.T5_response_Q6: Traditional (檔案類型/檔案大小/影片檔)
script_in_q_echos.T6_response_Q7: Traditional (這個工具/具體的結果/數據)
script_in_q_echos.T7_response_playback: MIXED-traditional-dominant — playback header uses 工作內容/參考對象/需要記憶/首次使用/防止搞壞/不要貪心/成功標準 (a stylistic Traditional rewrite of slot labels), and full playback uses 影片/匯出/設定/搞壞/字幕/多軌音訊 (all Traditional). Body text Trad-correct.
script_in_q_echos.overall: Traditional preserved across all LLM-generated turns. Meta v1's prior D16 (silent Simplification) did NOT regress in this run — interesting given v1 baseline (W2.3) DID regress to 视频/服务器. The likely explanation: triage-v2's improved vocab acceptance creates richer triage_output JSON, which feeds back into the Meta prompt's question-generation context with the user's original Traditional tokens still attached, indirectly preserving script even with Meta v1. This is an UNEXPECTED SIDE-EFFECT WIN of the triage swap — script normalization (D16) NOT regressing despite Meta-v1 restore.

D16_script_normalization.v1_W2.3 (Meta v1 + Triage v1): FAILED — Q2 normalized 影片→视频, 伺服器→服务器
D16_script_normalization.M2 (Meta v2 + Triage v1): FIXED — Q2 preserved 影片/轉檔/網站
D16_script_normalization.M5 (Meta v1 + Triage v2): ALSO FIXED — Q2 preserved 影片轉檔/網站/電腦/軟體 in Traditional, no normalization at any turn
D16_script_normalization.delta: Both v2 layers independently produce D16 win. Suggests D16 is NOT exclusively a Meta-prompt defect; the triage layer's vocab handling also contributes (likely via richer extraction passing more original-script tokens to Meta context).

D17_triage_traditional_anchor_vocab.M2 (Meta v2 only): FAILED — predicate_double_fail at T2 (Meta-v2 doesn't touch triage vocab)
D17_triage_traditional_anchor_vocab.M5 (Triage v2 only): FIXED — T2 anchor extracted on first pass with 錨點/檔案/轉檔/原檔名 all surviving
D17_triage_traditional_anchor_vocab.delta: DECISIVE LAYER ATTRIBUTION: D17 is a triage-layer defect, fully addressed by Triage v2.

session_slots_covered.M5: 7/8 (mirror unreachable due to auto-termination, not failure)

termination_turn.delta: Termination cause flipped from defect-driven to completion-driven

layer_split_verdict: TRIAGE-LAYER-IS-THE-CULPRIT-AND-TRIAGE-V2-FIXES-IT. The 2x2 layer-split A/B (Meta v1/v2 × Triage v1/v2 across W2.3/M2/M5) cleanly attributes the D17 Traditional-anchor-vocab extraction defect to the triage layer alone — Meta-v2 (M2) did NOT move the needle on D17, while Triage-v2 (M5) closed the entire 7-slot gap. The orthogonal D16 script-preservation win observed in M2 also reproduces in M5 (Meta v1 + Triage v2), confirming D16 has dual contributors. RECOMMENDATION FOR SHIP DECISION: Triage v2 (1078d6ba) is the load-bearing change for Phase 7 Traditional-Chinese support; Meta v2 is additive but not strictly required for the W2.3-class defect. Combined Meta-v2 + Triage-v2 is expected to be strictly best — recommend a confirmatory M9 (both v2) run before sign-off.

anomalies.description: T7 done-response `playback` text describes an entirely different product — a 'YouTube highlights / 精彩片段 extractor' with Canva-like editing, MP4/MOV input,风格模板 — NOT the GCS-Tokyo MP4 transcoder actually specified across T1-T6. Items 1-6 of the playback are fabricated; only item 7 (acceptance: 5 YouTubers, no complaints) matches user input. spec_capsule_cid is null, suggesting the playback was generated from a hallucinated synthesis rather than the actual covered_slots store.
anomalies.implications: Triage v2 correctly extracted into covered_slots (we have direct evidence: anchor/memory/first_run/robustness/scope all named) — so the defect is downstream of triage, in the synthesis/playback layer. This may be a Meta-v1 weakness in spec-summarization when given v2-shape triage output. Suggests a separate F-line defect: D18 — synthesis hallucinates spec content. Does NOT invalidate the TRIAGE-V2-FIX-CONFIRMED verdict (which is about extraction/coverage, observable in covered_slots arrays at each turn), but does flag a downstream issue.

anomalies.description: 6 transient 5xx (`llm complete returned ok=false; content=<empty>`) across 7 useful turns (T4 ×2, T5 ×1, T7 ×3). Hit rate ≈ 43%. All eventually succeeded on retry.
anomalies.implications: Backend LLM call layer needs retry hardening or rate-limit/timeout investigation. Not a triage-v2 defect, but degrades UX. May be load-induced (multiple mini-waves running concurrently).
anomalies.evidence_ref: turn_04.json, turn_04_retry.json, turn_05.json, turn_07.json, turn_07_retry.json, turn_07_retry2.json

anomalies.description: T8 (mirror) could not be tested because predicate auto-terminated session after T7 acceptance with confidence 0.95. T9 (done-playback) likewise unreachable. Per success criteria, this does not block TRIAGE-V2-FIX-CONFIRMED (≥4 slots covered, vocab acceptance verified). Mirror slot remains open at session end but does not represent a failure.
anomalies.implications: If mirror-slot coverage is required for full pass, the predicate `done` threshold may need adjustment (e.g., require 8/8 instead of 7/8 + confidence≥0.95). This is a session-orchestration policy question, not a triage-v2 defect.

evidence: covered ≥ 4 slots: YES (7 covered: job, anchor, memory, first_run, robustness, scope, acceptance)
D17 vocab acceptance verified: YES (錨點 → anchor slot, 檔案 → anchor+first_run, 轉檔 → anchor, all per turn_02.json + turn_04_retry2.json covered_slots arrays)

NO-IMPROVE.note: Clear improvement vs both v1 baseline and M2

narrative: Three-way A/B compare across the same persona (P7 Taiwanese developer, all-Traditional + Taiwan regional vocab) on identical answers T1-T9: (1) v1 baseline W2.3 with Meta v1 + Triage v1 — FAILED at T2 anchor with predicate double-fail, 1/7 slots (job only), confidence 0.0, terminated user_input_unparseable_no_spec. Failure mode: D16 (Q2 silently back-normalized to Simplified 视频/服务器) + D17 (triage rejected Traditional anchor vocab 錨點/檔案/轉檔 as irrelevant). (2) M2 with Meta v2 + Triage v1 — PARTIAL: D16 RESOLVED (Q2 preserved Traditional 影片轉檔/網站) as a beneficial side-effect of v2's Voss-mirror reduction, but D17 UNCHANGED — same predicate_double_fail at T2, same 1/7 slots, same confidence 0.0. (3) THIS M5 with Meta v1 + Triage v2 — TRIAGE-V2-FIX-CONFIRMED: T2 anchor extracted cleanly on first pass, session ran 7 useful turns covering job/anchor/memory/first_run/robustness/scope/acceptance, confidence 0.0→0.95 monotone, session auto-terminated by happy-path predicate `done` (not by failure). Mirror slot unreachable because session ended at T7 — not a defect. Surprise finding: D16 script-preservation ALSO held in M5 despite Meta v1 restore — likely because triage-v2's richer extraction feeds more original-Traditional tokens back into the Meta question-generation context. The layer-split is therefore decisive: D17 is fully owned by the triage layer (Triage v2 fixes it independently of Meta); D16 has dual contributors (both layers can independently fix it). One downstream anomaly surfaced: the T7 playback hallucinates a different product (YouTube highlights extractor) — extraction was correct (covered_slots arrays prove it) but synthesis/summarization is broken (likely Meta-v1 weakness when fed v2-shape triage output). This is a separate D18-class defect, not a triage-v2 regression. Recommendation: ship Triage v2 (1078d6ba) as load-bearing for Phase 7 Traditional support; run confirmatory M9 (Meta v2 + Triage v2) before final sign-off to confirm combined version handles synthesis correctly; file D18 for the playback-fabrication issue; investigate transient 5xx rate (6/13 calls).
ship_recommendation: TRIAGE-V2-IS-NECESSARY-AND-INDIVIDUALLY-SUFFICIENT-FOR-D17. Recommended next step: dispatch M9 (Meta v2 + Triage v2 combined) to verify (a) combined run reproduces ≥7-slot coverage, (b) playback synthesis is correct under combined v2 (likely yes — M2 saw Meta-v2 generate cleaner mirrors), (c) no unexpected cross-layer interaction. Hold ship of Phase 7 zh-Hant support until M9 confirms and D18 (playback hallucination) is triaged.
